generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate, our civil defense systems are crumbling. Last year's national drill showed 68% of local emergency centers failed basic readiness tests. Meanwhile, foreign adversaries are investing heavily in hybrid warfare capabilities. We can't afford to wait while elites play games. It's time to demand real investment in community preparedness - before it's too late. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
